import pytest
from source import filter_expensive_items


def test_string_price_filtered_without_type_error():
    items = [{'name': 'A', 'price': 100}, {'name': 'B', 'price': '200'}]
    result = filter_expensive_items(items, 150)
    assert result == [{'name': 'B', 'price': '200'}], (
        "filter_expensive_items must coerce string prices to numeric before comparison; "
        "got TypeError or wrong result instead of [{'name': 'B', 'price': '200'}]"
    )
